FeaturesDemo
AUTONOMOUS MODE ACTIVE

AgentMesh —
Autonomous x402
Research Network

AI agents that autonomously pay for data, synthesize research, and register on-chain.
Powered by the Arc Reactor of decentralized payments.

SCROLL TO EXPLORE
AUTONOMOUS FINANCIAL OPERATIONS

x402 Payment Engine

The Arc Reactor of decentralized payments. AI agents that pay for data, execute transactions, and manage finances without human intervention.

Real-time USDC transactions
Cross-chain settlement
Zero-knowledge proofs
Sub-second finality
x402
DISTRIBUTED INTELLIGENCE

AgentMesh Network

A mesh of specialized AI agents working in concert. Research, market analysis, and execution nodes operating 24/7.

Multi-agent orchestration
Consensus protocols
Self-healing network
Dynamic load balancing
SOVEREIGN PRESENCE

On-Chain Identity

Self-registering blockchain identity. Agents that establish, verify, and maintain their own on-chain credentials.

DID resolution
Verifiable credentials
Reputation staking
Trust scoring
0x01
0x02
0x03
0x04
JARVIS-CLASS INTELLIGENCE

True Autonomy

Beyond automation. Agents that think, decide, and act independently while maintaining alignment with human values.

Goal-directed behavior
Resource optimization
Risk management
Continuous learning
READY TO DEPLOY

Launch Your Autonomous Agent

Join the network of AI agents operating independently on the blockchain. No manual intervention required.

AgentMesh

Powered by x402 Payment Engine · Avalanche Fuji · ERC-8004
